<!-- Generated by scripts/generate-agent-surfaces.mjs from AGENTS.md. Do not edit directly. -->
# Agent Platform Support Matrix

This repository uses `AGENTS.md` as the canonical source. Platform files are generated wrappers or generated materialized copies so tool-specific instruction surfaces do not drift.

Run `bun run generate:agents` after changing `AGENTS.md`.

| Platform | File or context path | Support mode | Source | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Codex / OpenAI agents | `AGENTS.md` | canonical | [docs](https://agents.md/) | Repository root AGENTS.md is the canonical instruction source. |
| Claude Code | `CLAUDE.md` | native import wrapper | [docs](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/memory) | Real file that imports AGENTS.md. Preferred install uses dist/claude as a local Claude plugin marketplace. |
| Gemini CLI | `GEMINI.md` | native import wrapper | [docs](https://google-gemini.github.io/gemini-cli/docs/core/memport.html) | Uses @./AGENTS.md import syntax. |
| GitHub Copilot | `.github/copilot-instructions.md` | generated materialized rules | [docs](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/how-tos/configure-custom-instructions/add-repository-instructions) | Repository custom instructions file. |
| Cursor | `.cursor/rules/webcpu-easel.mdc` | generated materialized rules | [docs](https://docs.cursor.com/en/context/rules) | Always-apply project rule. |
| Zed | `.rules` | generated materialized rules | [docs](https://zed.dev/docs/ai/rules) | Zed checks .rules before AGENTS.md, so .rules prevents fallback shadowing surprises. |
| JetBrains AI Assistant | `.aiassistant/rules/webcpu-easel.md` | generated materialized rules | [docs](https://www.jetbrains.com/help/ai-assistant/configure-project-rules.html) | Project rules file; set rule type to Always in the IDE if needed. |
| JetBrains Junie | `.junie/AGENTS.md` | generated materialized rules | [docs](https://www.jetbrains.com/help/ai-assistant/junie-agent.html) | Junie prefers .junie/AGENTS.md, then root AGENTS.md. |
| Cline | `.clinerules/00-webcpu-easel.md` | generated materialized rules | [docs](https://docs.cline.bot/customization/cline-rules) | Workspace rules directory; Cline also detects root AGENTS.md. |
| KiloCode Legacy | `dist/kilocode/skills/webcpu-easel or .kilocode/skills/webcpu-easel` | packaged skill | [docs](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode/blob/main/packages/opencode/src/kilocode/docs/migration.md) | Kilo discovers project skills from .kilocode/skills and global skills from ~/.kilocode/skills; install.sh copies the packaged skill into the requested project. |
| Augment | `.augment/rules/webcpu-easel.md` | generated materialized rules | [docs](https://docs.augmentcode.com/setup-augment/guidelines) | Workspace rule; Augment also discovers AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md hierarchically. |
| Amp | `AGENTS.md` | native AGENTS.md | [docs](https://ampcode.com/manual) | Amp automatically includes AGENTS.md from cwd, parents, and subtrees. |
| Neovim | `AGENTS.md / llms.txt` | adapter-dependent | [docs](https://ampcode.com/manual) | No single Neovim-wide rule-file standard; use the chosen agent/plugin support, for example Amp's Neovim plugin reading AGENTS.md through Amp. |
| Google Antigravity | `AGENTS.md / generated wrappers` | documented fallback | [docs](https://antigravity.google/docs/rules-workflows) | Docs page is JavaScript-rendered; keep AGENTS.md plus standard wrappers until a static rule-file path is verified. |
| GitHub Copilot CLI | `.github/copilot-instructions.md / manual prompt context` | partial | [docs](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/how-tos/configure-custom-instructions/add-repository-instructions) | Repository instructions are verified for Copilot in GitHub/IDE surfaces; CLI behavior is not treated as a separate verified repo-file surface. |

## Rules

- Do not edit generated platform files by hand.
- Do not symlink `CLAUDE.md`; this repository requires a real file.
- Prefer native imports only where the platform documents import support.
- Use generated materialized rules when a platform reads a fixed file but does not document import resolution.
- If a platform has no verified repository rule-file standard, document the fallback instead of inventing one.
